_source: Real run on https://github.com/comodoc/flowmetrics-landing-page (April 2026), pushed to Peec project test3 (or_7718dbbc-...). Snapshot captured ~1h after push at 100% coverage. Files + PR are from PR #3 — the run with TanStack Start in-stack injection + 3 generated /vs/<x> comparison pages + cross-linking sub-footer nav.
fanout_queries: What are performance indicators in marketing?
key marketing KPIs examples and definitions
diff:
diff --git a/src/routes/__root.tsx b/src/routes/__root.tsx
--- a/src/routes/__root.tsx
+++ b/src/routes/__root.tsx
@@
 import { Outlet, Link, createRootRoute, HeadContent, Scripts } from "@tanstack/react-router";
 import appCss from "../styles.css?url";
+/* lovabletoseo:import-start */
+import { lovabletoseoMeta, lovabletoseoLinks, lovabletoseoScripts } from "@/lovabletoseo/meta";
+/* lovabletoseo:import-end */
@@ export const Route = createRootRoute({
     meta: [
       { name: "twitter:description", content: "FlowMetrics landing page showcases a SaaS analytics tool for B2B marketing teams." },
+      // lovabletoseo:start
+      ...lovabletoseoMeta,
+      // lovabletoseo:end
     ],
     links: [
       { rel: "stylesheet", href: appCss },
+      // lovabletoseo:start
+      ...lovabletoseoLinks,
+      // lovabletoseo:end
+    ],
+    scripts: [
+      // lovabletoseo:start
+      ...lovabletoseoScripts,
+      // lovabletoseo:end
     ],
   }),

diff --git a/src/lovabletoseo/meta.ts b/src/lovabletoseo/meta.ts
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/lovabletoseo/meta.ts
@@
+// lovabletoseo:managed — AUTO-GENERATED. Edit the strategy + re-run.
+export const lovabletoseoMeta = [
+  { title: "FlowMetrics — B2B Marketing Analytics Dashboard with AI Insights" },
+  { name: "description", content: "Real-time B2B marketing analytics dashboard with AI anomaly detection, drag-and-drop reports, and sub-second refresh. 14-day free trial, no credit card." },
+  { property: "og:title", content: "FlowMetrics — B2B Marketing Analytics Dashboard with AI Insights" },
+  { property: "og:url", content: "https://flowmetrics-landing-page.lovable.app" },
+  { name: "twitter:card", content: "summary_large_image" },
+  /* …og + twitter set …*/
+];
+export const lovabletoseoLinks = [
+  { rel: "canonical", href: "https://flowmetrics-landing-page.lovable.app" },
+];
+export const lovabletoseoScripts = [
+  // Organization JSON-LD: name, slogan, knowsAbout, foundingDate
+  // WebSite JSON-LD
+  // SoftwareApplication JSON-LD: featureList + Offer (14-day trial)
+  // FAQPage JSON-LD: 6 Q&As ("What is FlowMetrics?", "Who is it for?", "vs Klipfolio/Databox/Cyfe?", …)
+  // WebPage JSON-LD
+];

diff --git a/public/robots.txt b/public/robots.txt
+# lovabletoseo:managed
+User-agent: *
+Allow: /
+Sitemap: https://flowmetrics-landing-page.lovable.app/sitemap.xml

diff --git a/public/sitemap.xml b/public/sitemap.xml
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<urlset>
+  <url><loc>https://flowmetrics-landing-page.lovable.app/</loc><priority>1</priority></url>
+  <url><loc>https://flowmetrics-landing-page.lovable.app/compare/klipfolio</loc></url>
+  <url><loc>https://flowmetrics-landing-page.lovable.app/compare/databox</loc></url>
+  <url><loc>https://flowmetrics-landing-page.lovable.app/guides/b2b-marketing-kpis</loc></url>
+</urlset>

files_changed.description: TanStack head() injection: spreads our meta/links/scripts into the root route + renders <LovabletoseoNav />
Site-wide title, description, OG, Twitter, canonical + 5 JSON-LD blocks (Organization, WebSite, SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, WebPage)
<LovabletoseoNav /> sub-footer linking the 3 generated comparison pages
FlowMetrics vs Klipfolio comparison page with FAQPage + comparison JSON-LD
Lists all 6 routes including the new /vs/<x> pages
